result: {"query": "HMG-CoA reductase", "organism": "", "hits": [{"accession": "P14773", "protein_name": "3-hydroxy-3-methylglutaryl-coenzyme A reductase", "gene_names": ["Hmgcr"], "organism": "Drosophila melanogaster", "ec_numbers": ["1.1.1.34"], "sequence_length": 920, "function": "Synthesis of mevalonate for the production of non-sterol isoprenoids, which are essential for growth differentiation.
